headline: Immigration department corruption index ranked worst among 28 agencies
context: The Immigration Department ranked last in MACC's internal corruption perception index among 28 federal enforcement agencies for the third consecutive year in 2025.

cards.big: Immigration department ranked most corrupt of 28 agencies — 3 years running
cards.sub: MACC's own index shows entrenched corruption in Malaysia's border control

cards.big: 148 immigration officers arrested for corruption between 2022-2025
cards.sub: Average of 37 officers per year — systemic issue, not isolated cases

cards.big: Illegal immigration facilitated by corrupt officers costs economy estimated RM8.2 billion annually
cards.sub: Border corruption has direct economic consequences beyond the bribes themselves

cards.big: Department head was replaced 4 times in 5 years with no structural reform implemented
cards.sub: Leadership changes without systemic reform produce the same result repeatedly

cards.big: Changing the head of a corrupt agency without changing the system just gives corruption a new face
Should immigration enforcement be restructured with external oversight and rotation mandates?
